response.justification: Candidate lacks the mandatory technical requirements for this role. With only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus the required 5–10 years, no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no Windows platform background, they fall far short on critical technical prerequisites. Additionally, complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain experience eliminates the alternative pathway to qualification. While the resume demonstrates strong engineering practices and communication skills, these cannot substitute for the foundational technical and domain expertise required at mid-senior level.
strengths: Excellent communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching roles (addresses communication requirement)
Strong software engineering practices with emphasis on testing, CI/CD pipelines, and craftsmanship across multiple senior roles
Diverse technical background including Java and C# experience, showing ability to learn systems-level languages
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience at National Instruments versus 5–10 year requirement; insufficient for mid-senior role
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise; primary database exposure is MongoDB and MySQL, not enterprise RDBMS platforms required
Complete absence of Windows platform development, capital markets, financial services, or investment banking domain experience
